title: Deep Learning Assisted Identification of Crystal Populations in SEM Imagery of Submarine Volcaninc Rocks
summary: Utilized CoralNet-Toolbox to train and deploy a YOLO segmentation model to segment feldspar, pyroxene, and olivine crystals in SEM imagery of volcanic rocks samples from the 2024 E/V Nautilus expedition NA165.

title: Marine Organism Detection in ROV Footage using VIAME
summary: Trained and deployed a VIAME detection model to identify, classify, and count marine organisms in ROV footage collected during an E/V Nautilus expedition.

title: Interactive Qualifying Project (IQP) - Educational Resources for Prevention of Harmful Algal Blooms
summary: Port Phillip Bay, a semi-enclosed embayment just south of Melbourne, faces significant risks from Harmful Algal Blooms (HABs). This 8-week project aimed to bolster community awareness and education regarding these risks through three objectives: assessing the bay’s local importance, characterizing public understanding of HABs, and developing educational and engaging materials.

title: PyQt GUI Development for Configuring Surgical Stapling Device Settings
summary: Developed a GUI using PyQt that allows test engineers to modify settings and generate updated JSON configuration files for a surgical stapling device. The GUI includes input validation to ensure that the generated JSON files are valid and conform to the required schema.

title: Software Development for Signia Stapling System
Milimeter Wave Research for Tissue and Bone Classification
Kraft Mac & Cheese Customer Clustering using Web-Scraping and Machine Learning
Etsy Small Business - 3D-printed Earrings Designed using Onshape CAD
summary: Designed and sold 3D-printed earrings created using Onshape and iterative prototyping. Marketed business through social media and interacted with customers to improve product design and service quality.
